name: Indian Carrot Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Wheat sprouts or cooked wheat berries (for garnish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together the corn oil and lime juice in a large bowl.
2. Add the cumin, cinnamon, salt, and minced garlic to the mixture.
3. Stir in the sliced and cooked carrots until well combined.
4. Cover the bowl and refrigerate until chilled.
5. Serve chilled, garnished with wheat sprouts.
Food Exchanges per serving: 2 VEGETABLE EXCHANGES
CHO: 10g; PRO: 1g; FAT: 2g; CAL: 61;
Low-sodium diets: This recipe is suitable.
